name: Rajasthan Heritage Tour
overview: Explore the best of Delhi, Agra, Ranthambore, Jaipur, Mandawa with our expertly crafted tour package. Mother India Tour Travels provides comfortable AC vehicles, experienced guides, and hand-picked accommodations to make your journey unforgettable.
inclusions: Accommodation in listed or similar hotels
All transfers and sightseeing by private AC vehicle
All long distance travel as per itinerary
Chauffeur, Toll Taxes, Parking, Fuel charges
State Taxes, Green Taxes, Road Taxes
exclusions: Personal expenses (porterage, tips, laundry, mineral water)
Monument entrance fees and camera charges
Any activity not mentioned in inclusions
Additional cost due to flight cancellation, roadblocks, political unrest
notes: Taj Mahal is closed every Friday
Prices are per person on twin sharing basis

itinerary.title: Delhi – Manali: Pick up Volvo Coach from proceed Delhi to Manali in the evening
itinerary.description: Delhi – Manali: Pick up Volvo Coach from proceed Delhi to Manali in the evening .Overnight in the Bus.

itinerary.title: Manali Arrival(Half day local sightseeing: Arrive Manali in the morning , Check
itinerary.description: Manali Arrival(Half day local sightseeing: Arrive Manali in the morning , Check in to the hotel and after Breakfast & proceed to visit Hadimba Temple, Vashist Temple, Club House, Mall Road & Stay at hotel .

itinerary.title: Day trip to Rohtang, Solang Valley/Snow Point: Enjoy the morning breakfast at th
itinerary.description: Day trip to Rohtang, Solang Valley/Snow Point: Enjoy the morning breakfast at the hotel and later get ready for an excursion to visit Solang Valley.Solang Valley is outstandingly beautiful and is an ideal spot to view the majestic snow covered Himalayas, serene natural surrounding, pristine lake and fairy white snow round the year. After cover the sightseeing back to hotel. Stay in hotel.

itinerary.title: Day trip to visit Manikaran Gurudwara, Kullu valley enjoy boat ride & back to ho
itinerary.description: Day trip to visit Manikaran Gurudwara, Kullu valley enjoy boat ride & back to hotel & stay.

itinerary.title: Manali To Delhi Departure: Morning after breakfast, Check-out from hotel evening
itinerary.description: Manali To Delhi Departure: Morning after breakfast, Check-out from hotel evening catch the Volvo from Manali to proceed Delhi. Overnight Journey.

itinerary.title: Delhi – Arrival at Delhi Bus stand Rama Krishna Ashram Metro Station
itinerary.description:
Delhi – Arrival at Delhi Bus stand Rama Krishna Ashram Metro Station . proceed for your onward destination….
Honeymoon Tour available on demand
Please note: We can arrange tailor-made tours
Inclusions
Accommodation .
Welcome Drink Non Alcoholic.
Breakfast/Dinner
All Transfers, All sightseeing as per Tour Itinerary
All long distance Travels
Toll Taxes, Parkings, Fuel, State taxes
Pvt. Vehicle with driver at Manali
Guide Services
Exclusions
Meals other than those specified above
Personal expenses

itinerary.title: Arrival at Delhi Airport company representative assist you and transfer to the h
itinerary.description: Arrival at Delhi Airport company representative assist you and transfer to the hotel. Rest of the day at leisure.

itinerary.title: Delhi – Agra, (250 KM
itinerary.description: Delhi – Agra, (250 KM. Approx 3 Hrs.) Today after breakfast visit Old & New Delhi visit Jama Masjid, Rajghat (Gandhi Cremation place), India Gate, President House, Parliament, Qutub Minar, Lotus Temple, Humayun’s Tomb, & After proceed to Agra. Rest of the day at leisure.

itinerary.title: Agra – Ranthambore VIA Fatehpur Sikri (300 KM
itinerary.description: Agra – Ranthambore VIA Fatehpur Sikri (300 KM. Approx 6 Hrs.) : Today, after breakfast check out from hotel & proceed to visit memory of Love The Taj Mahal & after visit Agra Fort and proceed to Ranthambore En-Rout visit Fatehpur Sikri. Rest of the day at leisure.

itinerary.title: Ranthambore – Jaipur (160 KM
itinerary.description: Ranthambore – Jaipur (160 KM. Approx 4 Hrs.) : Today, Early morning proceed to Jungle Safari Tiger Century (Own Arrangement) & after come back to hotel & after breakfast proceed to Jaipur. Rest of the day at leisure.

itinerary.title: Jaipur Sightseeing : Today, after breakfast proceed to visit ancient capital of
itinerary.description: Jaipur Sightseeing : Today, after breakfast proceed to visit ancient capital of Amber. Visit beautiful Amber Fort after Amber Fort proceed to the pink city Jaipur we will visit Hawa Mahal(Window Palace), City Place and Observatory (Jantar Mantar) after visit famous block printing & James & Stone cutting factory work being done since centuries in Jaipur. Rest of the day at leisure.

itinerary.title: Jaipur – Mandawa (200 KM
itinerary.description: Jaipur – Mandawa (200 KM. Approx 4 Hrs.): Today, after breakfast proceed to Mandawa after check in walk around Mandawa it’s a small village in Shekhawati Region & visit beautiful painted old houses (Haveli’s) . Rest of the day at leisure.

itinerary.title: Mandawa – Delhi (260 KM
itinerary.description:
Mandawa – Delhi (260 KM. Approx 6-7 Hrs.): Today, after breakfast proceed to Delhi & drop you at Delhi Airport/Railway Station for your onward journey.
Please note: Taj mahal closed on every friday
Please note: We can arrange tailor-made tours
